data.title: Lipocine's Phase 3 trial for LPCN 1154 in PPD shows progress, with no safety issues reported in 82 randomized patients. Topline results in Q2 2026.
data.description: The company is set to release top-line results in the beginning of the second quarter of 2026. The second Data and Safety Monitoring Board (DSMB) meeting reviewed safety data for 82 randomly selected participants. There were no instances of drug discontinuations, excessive sedation, loss of consciousness, or drug-related serious adverse events (SAEs) reported.

data.title: SuperCom (SPCB) CEO to present at Sidoti Virtual Investor Conference on Jan. 12, 2026 for e-Government, IoT, and Cybersecurity sectors.
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel on January 12, 2026, SuperCom, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SPCB, revealed plans for an upcoming corporate overview by President and CEO Ordan Trabelsi. SuperCom specializes in providing secure solutions for e-Government, IoT, and Cybersecurity fields on a global scale. The event will feature one-on-one meetings with stakeholders and investors.

data.title: Life sciences M&A spending surges to $240 billion in 2025, up by 81%, fueled by Big Pharma deals. China leads alliance investment with 34%, AI key for innovation.
data.description: In 2025, the global life sciences sector saw a significant 81% surge in M&A activity, reaching a total of US$240 billion. This growth was mainly propelled by major acquisitions made by Big Pharma companies. Although the number of overall transactions decreased, China stood out by contributing to 34% of alliance investments throughout the year. Additionally, artificial intelligence (AI) technology played a critical role in the industry, particularly in the processes of identifying potential opportunities and facilitating deal-making.

data.title: Minaris and Genetix Biotherapeutics are expanding their partnership to increase manufacturing of LYFGENIA™ gene therapy for sickle cell disease. This will enhance efficiency and treat more patients.
data.description: Minaris is enhancing its commercial manufacturing for LYFGENIA™, the groundbreaking FDA-approved gene therapy for sickle cell disease. The expansion in capacity aims to meet the increasing patient demand. Moreover, it will enhance manufacturing efficiency, allowing for quicker treatment timelines for patients.

data.title: Fairbanks Morse Defense expands robotic welding program to enhance fleet readiness, reduce maintenance downtime for US Navy and allies.
data.description: Fairbanks Morse Defense (FMD) based in Beloit, Wisconsin, has revealed the enhancement of its robotic welding initiative to enhance ship repair and maintenance effectiveness for the U.S. Navy and allied fleets. The program utilizes automation, precision, and data-oriented performance to minimize operational downtime, enhance safety, and prolong the lifespan of naval equipment. FMD's robotic welding technology incorporates advanced machine learning for automated weld consistency.

data.title: Establishment Labs projects Q4 revenue of $64.0M to $65.0M in 2025, specialized in women’s health and wellness.
data.description: In New York, Establishment Labs Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: ESTA), a leading global medical technology company focused on enhancing women’s health, especially in breast aesthetics and reconstruction, revealed initial unaudited financial figures for the quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. The company anticipates the unaudited revenue for the fourth quarter of 2025 to fall between $64.0 million and $65.0 million, with a portion of $17.0 million included in the total figure.

data.title: Atlantic Alumina partners with U.S. Govt and Concord Resources for $450M project to boost domestic alumina production and build primary gallium circuit.
data.description: An alumina refinery in the United States, Atlantic Alumina Company LLC (ATALCO), has revealed a new collaboration with the United States Department of War (DOW) and Concord Resources Holdings Limited, alongside a fund managed by Pinnacle Asset Management, L.P. The initiative aims to boost domestic alumina production. ATALCO, the sole operating alumina refinery in the US, will be working with these entities to enhance production levels. This partnership underscores the commitment to sustaining and growing the alumina industry within the country.

data.title: Masco Corp (NYSE: MAS) to discuss 2025 Q4 and FY results on Feb 10, 2026, at 8:00 am ET with President/CEO Jon Nudi. Participants call (800) 549-8228 or (289) 819-1520 five to ten minutes prior.
data.description: In Livonia, Michigan, Masco Corporation (NYSE: MAS) disclosed plans for a conference call to discuss their 2025 fourth quarter and full year results on February 10, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET. The call, to be led by Masco President and CEO Jon Nudi, requests participants to dial (800) 549-8228 or (289) 819-1520 with a provided conference identification number before the start time.

data.title: Leonardo DRS to discuss Q4 2025 and full year 2025 results on Feb 24 starting at 10:00 am (ET). Visit investor relations website for more info.
data.description: A conference call has been arranged by Leonardo DRS, Inc. (Nasdaq: DRS) in Arlington, Virginia, for February 24, 2026, starting at 10:00 a.m. (ET) to review the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. Before the call, the company will release its quarterly earnings report. The conference call can be accessed live via audio broadcast on Leonardo DRS's investor relations website alongside the press release and additional details.

data.title: Esri's Custom Chart Builder adopted by Shom for nautical chart production, meeting safety standards for French Navy. Important advancement in automating maritime cartography.
data.description: Esri, a leading provider of location intelligence, revealed that the Shom (French Hydrographic and Oceanographic Office) has officially integrated Custom Chart Builder (CCB) into their systems for the automated creation of all paper nautical charts. After rigorous testing and customization, Shom verified that charts generated by CCB adhere to the rigorous safety criteria mandated by the French Navy. This signifies a significant progress in streamlining maritime cartography processes and underscores the commitment to modernizing navigation practices.

data.title: Kathleen Sherwin appointed as President & CEO of Orbis International, effective immediately. Brings 25+ years of experience.
data.description: Esteemed NGO leader Kathleen Sherwin has officially joined Orbis International to address the increasing global demand for eye care services. Commencing her role as President & CEO, Sherwin's extensive experience of over 25 years will be instrumental in driving Orbis's mission forward. The appointment aims to bolster Orbis's efforts to combat vision impairments worldwide.

data.title: Xi'an starts 2026 Chang'an Lantern Festival with stunning light displays to welcome spring.
data.description: In Xi'An, China on January 12, 2026, the 2026 Chang'an Lantern Festival kicked off with a vibrant lighting ceremony. The event, themed "Thousands of Lanterns Shining on Chang'an and Welcoming Spring with Horses," took place in the historic city of Xi'an. The festival, which has a long-standing tradition, showcased numerous lantern displays to mark the arrival of spring.

data.title: MDxHealth releases 2025 Q4 and full year revenues, gives 2026 guidance, and updates earnout terms with Exact Sciences.
data.description: MDxHealth has announced their preliminary revenues for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company also provided a revenue guidance for 2026. Additionally, MDxHealth disclosed amendments to the earnout terms with Exact Sciences. Specific numerical details were not provided.

data.title: Trybe secures $30M Series A investment from Five Elms Capital to expand globally and develop software.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in London, the prominent company Trybe revealed they have secured a substantial $30 million USD funding in their Series A round from Five Elms Capital. This investment will empower Trybe to broaden its reach on a global scale and enhance the advancement of their software solutions for managing spa, bathhouse, leisure, and activity facilities.
